section_name: Driving wrong way around traffic island
chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text:
(1) A person commits the offense of driving the wrong way around a traffic island if the person is operating a vehicle and the person drives the vehicle around a rotary traffic island in any direction except to the right of the island.

(2) The offense described in this section, driving the wrong way around a traffic island, is a Class B traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §622]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.330 — Driving wrong way around traffic island

(1) A person commits the offense of driving the wrong way around a traffic island if the person is operating a vehicle and the person drives the vehicle around a rotary traffic island in any direction except to the right of the island.

(2) The offense described in this section, driving the wrong way around a traffic island, is a Class B traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §622]

subsections.text: A person commits the offense of driving the wrong way around a traffic island if the person is operating a vehicle and the person drives the vehicle around a rotary traffic island in any direction except to the right of the island.
The offense described in this section, driving the wrong way around a traffic island, is a Class B traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §622]
